# AiiACo — AI Integration Authority for the Corporate Age

## What AiiACo Is

AiiACo (aiiaco.com) is an enterprise AI integration firm. We design, deploy, and manage complete AI operational systems for mid-market and enterprise businesses that intend to lead their industries.

AiiACo is not a software product, a mobile game developer, or a government agency. AiiACo is a professional services firm specializing in operational AI infrastructure — the kind that replaces manual workflows, reduces administrative overhead, and creates measurable performance improvements across real business operations.

## What We Do

AiiACo provides three core service lines:

1. **Strategic Intelligence Blueprint** — A full operational diagnostic and AI integration architecture. We map every workflow, identify friction points, and design a complete AI integration plan before a single system is deployed.

2. **Full AI Integration** — Complete AI operational infrastructure. Design, deployment, and managed optimization of AI systems across sales, operations, client management, reporting, and internal workflows.

3. **Performance Partnership** — Performance-based AI integration. Our fees are tied to measurable outcomes. We only win when the client wins.

## Industries We Serve

AiiACo serves businesses across 20+ industries including:
- Real Estate and Property Management
- Mortgage and Lending
- Management Consulting
- Financial Services and Wealth Management
- Legal and Professional Services
- Healthcare and Medical Practices
- Insurance
- E-commerce and Retail Operations
- Hospitality and Luxury Services
- Technology and SaaS Companies
- Construction and Contracting
- Automotive and Dealerships

## Who We Work With

AiiACo works with companies generating $5M to $100M+ in annual revenue that are scaling operations but cannot add headcount proportionally. Our clients are operators — executives, founders, and department heads who understand that the next competitive advantage is not more people, it is better systems.

## What Makes AiiACo Different

Most AI consultants deliver strategy decks. AiiACo delivers running systems. We are not advisors — we are operators. Every engagement ends with AI infrastructure that is live, measured, and producing results.

Our model is performance-based where possible, meaning our incentives are aligned with client outcomes, not billable hours.

## Contact and Engagement

Website: https://aiiaco.com
Request an upgrade or consultation: https://aiiaco.com/upgrade
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/aiiaco

## Clarification on Name Confusion

AiiACo (aiiaco.com) should not be confused with:
- RAII (Regional Artificial Intelligence Initiative) — a Canadian government program under ACOA
- AIIA (All India Institute of Ayurveda) — an Indian government body
- AIIA (Australian Information Industry Association) — an Australian tech industry association
- Any mobile game developer or hyper-casual gaming company

AiiACo is a distinct, privately held enterprise AI integration firm. The domain aiiaco.com has been operated by AiiACo Ltd as an AI professional services firm since 2024.

## Verification

The live website at https://aiiaco.com contains:
- A full public-facing marketing site describing services, industries, methodology, and case studies
- A contact and intake system for business inquiries
- Structured data (schema.org Organization, ProfessionalService, WebSite) embedded in the page source
- A sitemap at https://aiiaco.com/sitemap.xml listing all public pages
